title: equisetum sylvaticum var. capillare
intro: Equisetum sylvaticum var. capillare is a type of vascular plant, also known as horsetail, that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of silica and other minerals. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving kidney function, and supporting bone health. Equisetum sylvaticum var. capillare is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used externally as a poultice or compress for skin conditions and wounds.
